loading ? (
                    <Loader2 className="animate-spin" size={20} />
                  ) : isSaved ? (

                         job.status === 'Submitted' ? (
                           <>
                              <CheckCircle2 size={14} /> Submitted
                           </>
                         ) : (
                           <>
                              <ExternalLink size={14} /> Submit
                           </>
                         )
                       )
textarea
